---
title: "test_latency_check_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_latency_check_empire.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.93
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.68
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_latency_profiler_startup, test_latency_profiler_search. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.latency_check](file://src.tools.latency_check)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)

### Exports
- `test_latency_profiler_startup`
- `test_latency_profiler_search`
- `test_latency_profiler_failure`
